custom_sessions.name: Test Session
custom_sessions.description: A test custom session for testing purposes

custom_sessions.name: Git Status
custom_sessions.description: Watch short git status in a loop
custom_sessions.command: while true; do clear; git status -sb; sleep 2; done

custom_sessions.name: Cargo Check
custom_sessions.description: Run cargo check repeatedly while editing
custom_sessions.command: while true; do cargo check; sleep 5; done

custom_sessions.name: Ripgrep TODO
custom_sessions.command: while true; do clear; rg -n "TODO|FIXME" src || true; sleep 3; done

custom_sessions.name: Top
custom_sessions.description: Open top for quick system view

custom_sessions.name: Disk Usage
custom_sessions.command: while true; do clear; du -sh ./* | sort -h | tail -n 15; sleep 5; done

custom_sessions.name: Env Peek
custom_sessions.description: Show a filtered set of environment variables

custom_sessions.name: Date Ticker
custom_sessions.description: Show current date and time every second
custom_sessions.command: while true; do date; sleep 1; done

custom_sessions.name: Sleep Session
custom_sessions.description: Idle shell to test many session entries
